text:
@cs188  I can’t really explain it but I think it’s ok to use AI to produce some visual gags, having seen some long time, skilled poopers (such as bomberpooper) experimenting with AI shitposting and then creating some hybrid YTPs.

So take for instance a this one bit from a YTPBR from rudeboy where faceapp was used to make some serious dude smile in that uncanny forced AI way: this only added to the bit, and I can’t explain why it was so funny.

In short, I think AI can be used in the YTP pipeline in a good way, just like some older YTPs have used TTS Loquendo for some bits like “ytp news” (when creators were afraid to show themselves and stuff).

I can only imagine what someone like you would do to poop those AI Harry Potter shitposts.
